hub_subtitle: Business English para as reuniões com o time Global da Sanofi, congressos médicos e a apresentação de agosto

lesson.menu_title: Bigger, Better, Stronger -- Comparing Products, Markets and Results
lesson.menu_desc: Comparar para o time Global: como o Brasil se compara com o ano passado, qual indicação vai melhor e onde está a vantagem sobre o concorrente -- consolidação de comparativos e superlativos -- 34 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 13 -- Bigger, Better, Stronger (Comparatives & Superlatives Consolidation)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Emmanuele Orrico | Lesson 13 -- Bigger, Better, Stronger (Comparatives & Superlatives Consolidation)

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone. Let me give you a quick comparison of the regions this quarter. Brazil is our strongest market right now. Growth is higher than last year, and access is much better in the private sector. In fact, Brazil is outperforming the forecast for the third quarter in a row. Compared to last year, our biggest indication, atopic dermatitis, is growing faster than asthma. Our main competitor is still ahead in coverage, but our efficacy data gives us a clear advantage. Overall, Brazil is one of the most important markets in the portfolio, and the numbers are the best we have seen. Great work, team.

Hi Emmanuele, it's Claire from the Global team. Quick note before tomorrow's review. The VP loves comparisons, so please be ready to compare. Three things. First, tell him how Brazil compares to last year. Is it stronger? Is growth higher? Second, tell him which indication is your best, and why. And third, be ready to compare Brazil to the main competitor. Where is our advantage? Keep it simple. Bigger, better, higher, faster. He wants the big picture, not every number. You have the best story in the region, so tell it with confidence. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: Hi David, let me compare the numbers for you. Compared to last year, Brazil is much stronger. Our growth is higher, and access is faster. Atopic dermatitis is our best indication. And we are outperforming the forecast this quarter.

items.situation: The VP asks: "How does Brazil compare to last year?"
tips: Compared to last year, Brazil is much stronger.
Our growth is higher, and access is faster than last year.
Atopic dermatitis is our best indication.
Atopic dermatitis is the biggest indication in our portfolio.

items.situation: "How do you compare to your main competitor?"
tips: We have a clear advantage: higher efficacy.
Our competitor is ahead in coverage, but our efficacy is better.

items.situation: "Is Brazil an important market for us?"
tips: Brazil is one of the most important markets in our portfolio.
Yes. Brazil is one of our most important markets in the region.
The numbers are the best we have seen.
This is our best quarter, and we are outperforming the forecast.

items.situation: "Which market is bigger, the public or the private one?"
tips: The private market is bigger than the public one for this indication.
For atopic dermatitis, the private market is the biggest.
